compute_mode.contract: Execution parallelism contract. Unsupported modes or singleton work units degrade to serial/no-op behavior.
compute_mode.label: Compute Layout
compute_mode.question: Where should parallel work be attempted?
compute_mode.summary: Requests serial or parallel execution across models, horizons, targets, OOS dates, or trials.

parallel_by_horizon.label: Parallelize Horizons
parallel_by_horizon.summary: Parallelize across forecast horizons when multiple horizons exist.

parallel_by_model.label: Parallelize Models
parallel_by_model.summary: Parallelize across model-family variants when a model sweep exists.

parallel_by_oos_date.label: Parallelize OOS Dates
parallel_by_oos_date.summary: Parallelize across origin dates in a long pseudo-OOS window.

parallel_by_target.label: Parallelize Targets
parallel_by_target.summary: Parallelize across targets in a multi-target run.

serial.label: Serial
serial.summary: Run one unit of work at a time.

experiment_unit.contract: Derived runner contract. Explicit values must match target and sweep constraints.
experiment_unit.label: Execution Unit
experiment_unit.question: Which execution unit should own this recipe?
experiment_unit.summary: Usually derived by the compiler from research design, target structure, and sweep shape.

benchmark_suite.label: Benchmark Suite
benchmark_suite.summary: Reserved route for a bundled benchmark suite.

hierarchical_forecasting_run.label: Hierarchical Forecasting
hierarchical_forecasting_run.summary: Reserved route for hierarchy-aware forecast execution.

multi_target_separate_runs.label: Separate Runs Per Target
multi_target_separate_runs.summary: Run each target independently and write separate outputs.

multi_target_shared_design.label: Multi-Target Shared Design
multi_target_shared_design.summary: Evaluate multiple targets under the same data and representation design.

panel_forecasting_run.label: Panel Forecasting
panel_forecasting_run.summary: Reserved route for panel-oriented forecast execution.

replication_recipe.label: Replication Run
replication_recipe.summary: Execution unit derived for replication recipes.

single_target_full_sweep.label: Full Sweep
single_target_full_sweep.summary: Reserved grammar for wider single-target sweep orchestration.

single_target_generator_grid.label: Model Comparison
single_target_generator_grid.summary: Compare model-family or representation variants for one target.

single_target_single_generator.label: One Target, One Model
single_target_single_generator.summary: Default unit for a single target with one model path.

state_space_run.label: State-Space Forecasting
state_space_run.summary: Reserved route for state-space forecast execution.

failure_policy.contract: Runtime failure contract. Sweep-compatible modes decide whether invalid variants stop or are skipped.
failure_policy.label: Failure Handling
failure_policy.question: What should happen when a run, variant, or cell fails?
failure_policy.summary: Controls whether the run stops, skips failed units, warns, or preserves partial results.

fail_fast.label: Stop on First Failure
fail_fast.summary: Abort immediately so the first error can be investigated.

fallback_to_default_hp.label: Use Default Hyperparameters
fallback_to_default_hp.summary: Reserved policy for using default hyperparameters after tuning failure.

retry_then_skip.label: Retry Then Skip
retry_then_skip.summary: Reserved policy for retryable cells before skipping.

save_partial_results.label: Save Partial Results
save_partial_results.summary: Persist completed artifacts before aborting or reporting failure.

skip_failed_cell.label: Skip Failed Sweep Cells
skip_failed_cell.summary: Continue a sweep while recording failed variant status.

skip_failed_model.label: Skip Failed Model Branches
skip_failed_model.summary: Continue after failures scoped to one model branch.

warn_only.label: Warn Only
warn_only.summary: Emit warnings and continue when failures are recoverable.

reproducibility_mode.contract: Seed and determinism contract applied before stochastic model code runs.
reproducibility_mode.label: Reproducibility
reproducibility_mode.question: How strictly should stochastic components be pinned?
reproducibility_mode.summary: Controls seeds and deterministic-library settings before model execution.

best_effort.label: Best-Effort Seeded Run
best_effort.summary: Apply available seeds and mark the run as non-strict.

seeded_reproducible.label: Seeded Run
seeded_reproducible.summary: Seed Python, NumPy, and optional torch without strict backend flags.

strict_reproducible.label: Strict Reproducible Run
strict_reproducible.summary: Use deterministic-library settings for replication-grade reruns.

research_design.contract: User-facing runner route. This affects executor family, sweep interpretation, and artifact shape.
research_design.label: Research Design
research_design.question: What kind of forecasting study are you running?
research_design.summary: Selects the top-level study route: one run, controlled comparison, study bundle, or replication.

controlled_variation.label: Controlled Comparison
controlled_variation.summary: Vary one or more choices while holding the rest of the study path fixed.

replication_recipe.label: Replication Recipe
replication_recipe.summary: Rerun a known paper-style recipe and record replication provenance and deviations.

single_forecast_run.label: Single Forecasting Run
single_forecast_run.summary: Run one resolved forecasting path and produce forecasts, metrics, and artifacts.

study_bundle.label: Study Bundle
study_bundle.summary: Hand the recipe to a higher-level study runner, such as a benchmark suite or ablation route.

required_companions: at least two active block sources for mixed_blocks
registered custom block or custom combiner for custom_blocks

operational_narrow_contracts.pruning_surface: Navigator compatibility, compiler blocked_reasons, and runtime route guard
required_companions: registered custom model_family or built-in MIDAS model_family

operational_narrow_contracts.pruning_surface: Layer 3 capability matrix and compiler blocked_reasons

deviations_from_original_paper: This entry is a package-native runnable path, not a byte-identical replication package.
Vintage availability is revised/pseudo-OOS unless a real-time source adapter is supplied.
The model grid is represented as individual navigator recipes or a sweep, not as the full paper table bundle.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import get_replication_entry, replication_recipe_yaml
from macrocast import compile_recipe_dict, run_compiled_recipe
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge'))
compiled = compile_recipe_dict(recipe)
result = run_compiled_recipe(compiled.compiled, output_root='results/gc2021')
replications.paper_name: Goulet Coulombe et al. (2021), International Journal of Forecasting
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      research_design: single_forecast_run
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      source_adapter: fred_md
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      variable_universe: all_variables
      missing_availability: zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps
      release_lag_rule: ignore_release_lag
      contemporaneous_x_rule: forbid_same_period_predictors
      official_transform_policy: apply_official_tcode
      official_transform_scope: target_and_predictors
      raw_missing_policy: zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_before_tcode
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 6
      - 12
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      x_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      tcode_policy: official_tcode_then_extra_preprocess
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: standard
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: official_tcode_then_extra
      preprocess_fit_scope: train_only
      inverse_transform_policy: target_only
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      target_lag_block: none
      x_lag_feature_block: none
      factor_feature_block: none
      level_feature_block: none
      temporal_feature_block: none
      rotation_feature_block: none
      feature_block_combination: replace_with_blocks
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: ar_bic
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: ridge
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    fixed_axes:
      export_format: json
      saved_objects: full_bundle
      provenance_fields: full
      artifact_granularity: aggregated
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 60
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      equal_predictive: dm
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: FRED-MD style macro forecasting path with official transformations, raw-panel ridge generator, AR-BIC benchmark, and MSFE evaluation.

deviations_from_original_paper: Synthetic fixture route; no external paper claims.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import replication_recipe_yaml
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('synthetic-replication-roundtrip'))
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: synthetic-replication-roundtrip-navigator
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      research_design: single_forecast_run
      experiment_unit: single_target_single_generator
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      source_adapter: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: autoreg_lagged_target
      model_family: ar
      forecast_type: iterated
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      stat_test: none
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: Small fixture-safe replication route used to verify recipe lowering and artifact contracts.

deviations_from_original_paper: Runtime fixture route; no paper-identical claims.
Uses current package FRED-SD fixture unless an official vintage is supplied.
Demonstrates the almonp MIDAS weight-family branch, not a full MIDAS grid.
replications.notebook_snippet:
from macrocast.navigator import replication_recipe_yaml
from macrocast import compile_recipe_dict, run_compiled_recipe
import yaml
recipe = yaml.safe_load(replication_recipe_yaml('fred-sd-midasr-almonp-direct'))
compiled = compile_recipe_dict(recipe)
result = run_compiled_recipe(
    compiled.compiled,
    output_root='results/fred_sd_midasr_almonp',
    local_raw_source='tests/fixtures/fred_sd_sample.csv',
)
replications.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: fred-sd-midasr-almonp-direct
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      research_design: single_forecast_run
      experiment_unit: single_target_single_generator
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_sd
      source_adapter: fred_sd
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      fred_sd_frequency_policy: report_only
      official_transform_policy: keep_official_raw_scale
      raw_missing_policy: preserve_raw_missing
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: UR_CA
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      fred_sd_mixed_frequency_representation: mixed_frequency_model_adapter
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      feature_block_set: transformed_x
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: midasr
      midasr_weight_family: almonp
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
    leaf_config:
      training_config:
        midas_max_lag: 3
        midasr_almonp_degree: 2
        midasr_max_terms: 12
        midasr_max_nfev: 500
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      stat_test: none
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
replications.short_description: Fixture-safe FRED-SD direct forecast using Layer 2 native-frequency adapter payloads and the built-in Layer 3 midasr/almonp restricted MIDAS executor.

samples.label: model-benchmark-ar-vs-zero-change
samples.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: model-benchmark-ar-vs-zero-change
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      research_design: single_forecast_run
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: autoreg_lagged_target
      model_family: ar
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      stat_test: none
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none

future_cells.opening_rule: open only after Layer 2 emits an explicit sequence/tensor representation and Layer 3 writes typed sequence payloads
hold_last_observed, observed_future_x, scheduled_known_future_x, and recursive_x_model(ar1) are operational; broader recursively forecast future-X paths remain gated
requires: explicit hold_last_observed, observed_future_x, scheduled_known_future_x, or recursive_x_model(ar1) exogenous-X scenario

blocked.direct: direct target-lag-only runtime is not implemented

blocked.iterated: raw-panel iterated runtime requires an explicit future-X scenario

status_catalog.blocked_by_incompatibility: the selected values are valid individually but cannot compose in the current runtime
status_catalog.not_supported_yet: the cell is reserved for a future runtime contract and is not accepted as an executable recipe value
status_catalog.operational: the selected cell has a runtime contract and can execute
status_catalog.operational_narrow: the selected cell executes for a named narrow contract slice while broader variants remain gated
status_catalog.registry_only: the registry names a placeholder or extension hook without a built-in runtime contract

path:

    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      source_adapter: fred_md
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      target_transform_policy: raw_level
      x_transform_policy: raw_level
      tcode_policy: raw_only
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: none
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: none
      preprocess_fit_scope: not_applicable
      inverse_transform_policy: none
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: zero_change
      feature_builder: autoreg_lagged_target
      model_family: ar
      forecast_type: iterated
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 5
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      stat_test: none
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none

status_catalog.operational_narrow: the selected cell executes for a named narrow contract slice while broader variants remain gated
status_catalog.registry_only: the registry names a placeholder or extension hook without a built-in runtime contract

samples.label: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
samples.recipe_yaml:
recipe_id: goulet-coulombe-2021-fred-md-ridge
path:
  0_meta:
    fixed_axes:
      research_design: single_forecast_run
      failure_policy: fail_fast
      compute_mode: serial
      reproducibility_mode: seeded_reproducible
    leaf_config:
      random_seed: 42
  1_data_task:
    fixed_axes:
      dataset: fred_md
      source_adapter: fred_md
      frequency: monthly
      information_set_type: final_revised_data
      target_structure: single_target
      variable_universe: all_variables
      missing_availability: zero_fill_leading_predictor_gaps
      release_lag_rule: ignore_release_lag
      contemporaneous_x_rule: forbid_same_period_predictors
      official_transform_policy: apply_official_tcode
      official_transform_scope: target_and_predictors
      raw_missing_policy: zero_fill_leading_predictor_missing_before_tcode
      raw_outlier_policy: preserve_raw_outliers
    leaf_config:
      target: INDPRO
      horizons:
      - 1
      - 3
      - 6
      - 12
  2_preprocessing:
    fixed_axes:
      horizon_target_construction: future_target_level_t_plus_h
      target_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      x_transform_policy: official_tcode_transformed
      tcode_policy: official_tcode_then_extra_preprocess
      target_missing_policy: none
      x_missing_policy: none
      target_outlier_policy: none
      x_outlier_policy: none
      scaling_policy: standard
      dimensionality_reduction_policy: none
      feature_selection_policy: none
      preprocess_order: official_tcode_then_extra
      preprocess_fit_scope: train_only
      inverse_transform_policy: target_only
      evaluation_scale: raw_level
      target_lag_block: none
      x_lag_feature_block: none
      factor_feature_block: none
      level_feature_block: none
      temporal_feature_block: none
      rotation_feature_block: none
      feature_block_combination: replace_with_blocks
  3_training:
    fixed_axes:
      framework: expanding
      benchmark_family: ar_bic
      feature_builder: raw_feature_panel
      model_family: ridge
      forecast_type: direct
      forecast_object: point_mean
  4_evaluation:
    fixed_axes:
      primary_metric: msfe
  5_output_provenance:
    fixed_axes:
      export_format: json
      saved_objects: full_bundle
      provenance_fields: full
      artifact_granularity: aggregated
    leaf_config:
      manifest_mode: full
      benchmark_config:
        minimum_train_size: 60
  6_stat_tests:
    fixed_axes:
      equal_predictive: dm
  7_importance:
    fixed_axes:
      importance_method: none
